settings.description: Artisanal specialty coffee, handcrafted pastries, and premium organic ice cream. Made fresh, served with love.
settings.announcement: Daily Special: Lavender Honey Latte with a fresh butter croissant for only $8.50!

contact.address: 123 Coffee & Cream Lane, Food District, NY 10001
contact.hours: Mon-Fri: 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM | Sat-Sun: 8:00 AM - 9:00 PM

menuItems.name: House Espresso Blend
menuItems.description: Medium-dark roast with notes of dark chocolate, brown sugar, and a smooth citrus finish.

menuItems.name: Ceremonial Matcha Latte
menuItems.description: Stone-ground Japanese Uji matcha whisked with steamed organic oat milk and a touch of agave.

menuItems.name: Classic Butter Croissant
menuItems.description: Flaky, multi-layered French pastry baked fresh daily with organic butter.

menuItems.name: Lavender Honey Latte
menuItems.description: Double espresso shot with floral lavender-infused syrup, wild honey, and creamy milk.

menuItems.name: Salted Caramel Gelato
menuItems.description: Creamy house-churned gelato with fleur de sel and a rich swirl of caramelized sugar.

menuItems.name: Triple Berry Waffle Bowl
menuItems.description: Warm homemade waffle bowl loaded with vanilla bean ice cream, fresh strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries.

menuItems.name: Rosemary Garlic Focaccia
menuItems.description: House-baked Italian bread drizzled with extra virgin olive oil, sea salt, and fresh rosemary.
